utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five. Each required item also includes the necessary details: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health coverage with costs (monthly cost noted, even if not broken down); property_coverage includes coverage details and costs; travel_coverage includes detailed coverage and costs; additional_services includes services and costs; total_budget includes complete monthly and annual breakdowns. Therefore, all 5 items are present and fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan describes each category qualitatively. For health coverage, it specifies 'Premium international health coverage with global network, pre-existing conditions covered, immediate specialist access, preventive care, prescription coverage, dental and vision included' — this directly aligns with the top-tier physical health plans (EliteCare Premium Plan or PrimeCare Premium Plan), both rated 10. For mental health, the plan lists 'Executive stress management programs, crisis intervention, family therapy, psychiatry services, condition management programs', which matches the premium mental health plans (PrimeCare Premium Plan or EliteCare Premium Plan), also rated 10. For property, the coverage mentions 'High-value property protection up to €100,000, luxury items, business equipment, electronics, jewelry, liability protection, temporary accommodation, natural disaster coverage', which corresponds to a premium home coverage like 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' or 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage', rated 10. For travel coverage, it includes 'Premium business travel protection, medical evacuation, emergency coordination, trip cancellation, baggage protection, travel delay compensation, English-speaking medical network, global assistance' — this maps directly to the 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' or 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan', rated 10. The 'additional_services' section has 'Concierge services, dedicated agent, priority claims processing, 24/7 customer support, global assistance, emergency coordination, multilingual support, mobile app access, online portal, direct billing', which aligns with 'Premium Insurance Membership' from general_services, rated 10. Thus, all selected components correspond to the highest-rated offerings.
